title: AI Support Entry Strategy
prompt:
Create a seven-slide strategy proposal for product and go-to-market leaders selecting an AI support market-entry wedge. Frame the market tension, compare three segments, show capability fit, sequence the roadmap, surface risks, and recommend one option. Use the supplied scoring table exactly. Include an editable landscape, aligned option comparison, roadmap timeline, and recommendation gate. Avoid generic two-by-two decoration without labeled axes.

Design direction: Use a cinematic minimal direction: fewer words, larger visual centers, deliberate scale changes, one memorable visual climax, and quiet transition beats. Keep all evidence honest and editable.

designDirection.label: Cinematic minimal
designDirection.instruction: Use a cinematic minimal direction: fewer words, larger visual centers, deliberate scale changes, one memorable visual climax, and quiet transition beats. Keep all evidence honest and editable.
